The '''Southern Deserts''' were the deserts of the southern hemisphere of [[Sevarcos II]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Southern Deserts were governed by [[Spice lord|Spice Lord]] [[Xerxes Quintas]], who allowed the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] to mine [[Spice/Legends|spice]] in his territories, much to the dismay of many nomadic [[Sevari]] clans.
